title: New Integration Suggestions
excerpt:

posts.author: annab (Anna Barr)
posts.cookedHtml:
We would like to see new integrations with the following systems:

  • PowerDMS - learning assessments, certificates, etc.

  • Visuant - scorecards, metrics, action items, weekly meeting info, etc.

  • iDashboards - data sharing/automate a currently manual process

  • TeleStaff - associate schedules, roles, etc.

posts.author: Chfraym (Christian)
posts.cookedHtml:
Would love to see integrations with commonly used Ad platforms with performance metrics (Similar to Facebook Ads):

  • Google Ads
  • LinkedIn Campaign Manager
  • Pardot Email Performance

posts.author: jamespatten (James Patten)
posts.cookedHtml: @Chfraym if you’re still looking for the performance metrics integration then I’d recommend checking out the Data Importer app.
